Title: Create a new user profile
Preconditions: User has installed the PICKAPP application and is on the registration screen.
Test Data: Valid email (e.g., test@example.com), password (e.g., P@ssw0rd123), full name (e.g., John Doe), address (e.g., Via Roma 1, 30175 Venezia), age (e.g., 30), phone number (e.g., +393123456789)
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Register" button.
2. Enter the full name in the "Name" field.
3. Enter the email address in the "Email" field.
4. Enter a valid password in the "Password" field.
5. Confirm the password in the "Confirm Password" field.
6. Enter the address in the "Address" field.
7. Enter the age in the "Age" field.
8. Enter the phone number in the "Phone" field.
9. Tap on the "Create Profile" button.
Expected Result:
Profile is successfully created, and the user is redirected to the login screen with a confirmation message "Profile created successfully. Please log in."
--

Title: Access user profile after login
Preconditions: User has created a profile and logged in successfully.
Test Steps:
1. Log in using valid credentials.
2. Tap on the "Profile" icon in the bottom navigation bar.
Expected Result:
User profile screen is displayed with the user's name, email, address, age, and phone number.
--

Title: Update user profile information
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile screen.
Test Data: Updated phone number (e.g., +393987654321), updated address (e.g., Via Dante 2, 30175 Venezia)
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Edit Profile" button.
2. Modify the phone number in the "Phone" field.
3. Modify the address in the "Address" field.
4. Tap on the "Save Changes" button.
Expected Result:
Profile information is updated successfully, and a confirmation message "Profile updated successfully" is displayed.
--

Title: Create a new commission request
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home screen.
Test Data: Commission title (e.g., Grocery Shopping), description (e.g., Need milk, bread, and eggs), location (e.g., Via Roma 1, 30175 Venezia), date (e.g., 2023-12-15), time (e.g., 10:00 AM)
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Create Commission" button.
2. Enter the commission title in the "Title" field.
3. Enter the description in the "Description" field.
4. Select the location from the map or enter manually.
5. Set the date using the date picker.
6. Set the time using the time picker.
7. Tap on the "Create Commission" button.
Expected Result:
Commission is created successfully, and the user is redirected to the commission details screen with a confirmation message "Commission created successfully."
--

Title: View own created commissions
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created at least one commission.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Commissions" tab in the bottom navigation bar.
2. Select the "My Commissions" option.
Expected Result:
List of commissions created by the user is displayed with titles, descriptions, dates, and statuses (e.g., "Pending," "Completed").
--

Title: View commissions created by other users
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are commissions created by other users.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Commissions" tab in the bottom navigation bar.
2. Select the "All Commissions" option.
Expected Result:
List of commissions created by other users is displayed with titles, descriptions, dates, statuses, and creator names.
--

Title: Accept a commission request
Preconditions: User is logged in, has viewed a commission created by another user, and the commission is in "Pending" status.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Commissions" tab in the bottom navigation bar.
2. Select the "All Commissions" option.
3. Find a commission in "Pending" status and tap on it.
4. Tap on the "Accept Commission" button.
Expected Result:
Commission status changes to "Accepted," and a confirmation message "You have accepted the commission" is displayed. The commission is removed from the "All Commissions" list and appears in the user's "Accepted Commissions" list.
--

Title: View accepted commissions
Preconditions: User is logged in and has accepted at least one commission.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Commissions" tab in the bottom navigation bar.
2. Select the "Accepted Commissions" option.
Expected Result:
List of commissions accepted by the user is displayed with titles, descriptions, dates, statuses, and requester names.
--

Title: Create a new product offer (food sharing)
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the home screen.
Test Data: Offer title (e.g., Fresh Vegetables), description (e.g., Carrots, potatoes, and onions to share), quantity (e.g., 5 kg), expiration date (e.g., 2023-12-10), location (e.g., Via Roma 1, 30175 Venezia)
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Create Offer" button.
2. Enter the offer title in the "Title" field.
3. Enter the description in the "Description" field.
4. Enter the quantity in the "Quantity" field.
5. Set the expiration date using the date picker.
6. Select the location from the map or enter manually.
7. Tap on the "Create Offer" button.
Expected Result:
Offer is created successfully, and the user is redirected to the offer details screen with a confirmation message "Offer created successfully."
--

Title: View own created offers
Preconditions: User is logged in and has created at least one offer.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Offers" tab in the bottom navigation bar.
2. Select the "My Offers" option.
Expected Result:
List of offers created by the user is displayed with titles, descriptions, quantities, expiration dates, and statuses (e.g., "Pending," "Accepted").

Title: View offers created by other users
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are offers created by other users.

2. Select the "All Offers" option.
Expected Result:
List of offers created by other users is displayed with titles, descriptions, quantities, expiration dates, statuses, and creator names.

Title: Accept a product offer
Preconditions: User is logged in, has viewed an offer created by another user, and the offer is in "Pending" status.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "Offers" tab in the bottom navigation bar.
2. Select the "All Offers" option.
3. Find an offer in "Pending" status and tap on it.
4. Tap on the "Accept Offer" button.
Expected Result:
Offer status changes to "Accepted," and a confirmation message "You have accepted the offer" is displayed. The offer is removed from the "All Offers" list and appears in the user's "Accepted Offers" list.

Title: View accepted offers
Preconditions: User is logged in and has accepted at least one offer.

1. Tap on the "Offers" tab in the bottom navigation bar.
2. Select the "Accepted Offers" option.
Expected Result: List of offers accepted by the user is displayed with titles, descriptions, quantities, expiration dates, and requester names.

Title: Verify automatic uninstallation of application files
Preconditions: Application is installed on an Android device with version 4.6.1 or higher
Test Steps:
1. Open the device’s application settings.
2. Locate the installed application in the list.
3. Select the uninstall option.
4. Confirm the uninstallation by selecting "OK" or "Delete."
Expected Result: All application-related files are automatically removed from the device.

Title: Verify prevention of duplicate offer selection
Preconditions: Two users are logged in and attempting to select the same offer simultaneously
Test Data: Same offer ID, two different user accounts
Test Steps:
1. User A selects an offer from the available list.
2. User B attempts to select the same offer before User A’s selection is processed.
3. The system processes User A’s selection.
Expected Result: User B is prevented from selecting the same offer and receives an error message indicating the offer is no longer available.

Title: Verify application compatibility with Android 4.6.1
Preconditions: Android emulator or device with version 4.6.1 is set up
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on the Android 4.6.1 device/emulator.
2. Launch the application.
3. Navigate through at least three main features (e.g., login, offer selection, profile settings).
Expected Result: The application launches successfully and all features function without crashes or compatibility errors.

Title: Verify application fluidity during user interactions
Preconditions: Application is installed and running on a device with stable internet connectivity
Test Steps:
1. Perform a rapid series of interactions (e.g., swiping through offers, selecting an offer, navigating back).
2. Measure the time taken for each interaction to complete.
Expected Result: The application responds within 2 seconds for each interaction without noticeable lag or freezing.

Title: Verify data consistency during concurrent updates
Preconditions: Two users are logged in and attempting to update the same data (e.g., offer status) simultaneously
Test Data: Same offer ID, two different user accounts
Test Steps:
1. User A updates the status of an offer (e.g., marks it as "taken").
2. User B attempts to update the same offer status before User A’s update is reflected in the database.
3. Verify the final status of the offer in the database.
Expected Result: The database reflects only one valid update (User A’s), and User B’s update is rejected with an error message.

Title: Verify minimum storage requirement for installation
Preconditions: Device has exactly 10 MB of free storage
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to install the application on the device.
Expected Result: The installation process either succeeds or provides a clear error message indicating insufficient storage (if less than 10 MB is available).

Title: Verify simplicity and intuitiveness of application UI
Preconditions: Application is installed and launched on a device
Test Steps:
1. Observe the main screen layout and navigation options.
2. Attempt to complete a task (e.g., logging in, selecting an offer) without referring to external documentation.
Expected Result: The UI is visually clear, navigation is intuitive, and the task is completed successfully within 3 attempts.

Title: Verify application functionality without internet connectivity
Preconditions: Device is in airplane mode or has no active internet connection
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to perform an action requiring internet (e.g., logging in, fetching offers).
Expected Result: The application either displays an error message indicating no internet connection or provides offline functionality (if applicable) with a clear notification.

Title: Verify user data privacy during registration
Preconditions: User is attempting to register a new account
Test Steps:
1. Enter registration details (name, email, password).
2. Submit the registration form.
3. Log in with the newly created credentials.
4. Attempt to access or modify another user’s data using the registered account.
Expected Result: The system prevents access to other users’ data, and the registered user can only view/modify their own data. No unauthorized data exposure occurs.

Test Data: Valid user credentials, available offers from other users.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a registered user.
2. Navigate to the "Accept Offers" screen.
3. Browse and select an offer to accept.
4. Confirm acceptance.
Expected Result: The offer is marked as accepted and visible in the user's "Accepted Offers" list. A database entry is created linking the user to the accepted offer.

Title: View Accepted Offers
Preconditions: User has accepted at least one offer.
Test Data: User account with accepted offers, offer details (e.g., offerent info).
Test Steps:
1. Log in as the user who accepted offers.
2. Navigate to the "View Accepted Offers" screen.
3. Select an accepted offer.
Expected Result: The system displays the offer details and the offerent's information.
